fix_suggestion.reason: Missing ASN.1 generated source files F1AP_LTMCellSwitchInformation.c and F1AP_LTMCFRAResourceConfig.c in the f1ap ASN.1 source list causes undefined references at link time.
fix_suggestion.config_fix: Add missing ASN.1 generated .c files for F1AP_LTMCellSwitchInformation and F1AP_LTMCFRAResourceConfig to f1ap-18.6.0.cmake f1ap_source list.

config_patches.current_value: No deterministic in-file edit was safely grounded.
config_patches.new_value: Clean ASN.1 objects/static library and rebuild linker targets (see investigation_steps).
config_patches.description: Advisory build-system action: linker unresolved ASN.1 symbols detected. No safe auto-edit found in local workspace, so apply clean/rebuild steps.

fix_suggestion.root_cause_analysis: The linker errors indicate that the ASN.1 generated source files defining asn_DEF_F1AP_LTMCellSwitchInformation and asn_DEF_F1AP_LTMCFRAResourceConfig are missing from the build. These files must be included in the f1ap ASN.1 source list (f1ap_source) in the f1ap-18.6.0.cmake file to be compiled and linked into libasn1_f1ap.a. Their absence causes undefined references at link time.
investigation_steps: Verify that F1AP_LTMCellSwitchInformation.c and F1AP_LTMCFRAResourceConfig.c exist in openair2/F1AP/MESSAGES/ASN1/
Check the contents of openair2/F1AP/MESSAGES/ASN1/f1ap-18.6.0.cmake to confirm if these files are listed in the f1ap_source variable.
If missing, add these files to the f1ap_source list as shown in the patch and then run 'cmake --build .' to rebuild the libasn1_f1ap.a and the nr-softmodem target.
If files exist and are listed but errors persist, perform a full clean build: 'rm -rf cmake_targets/ran_build/build && cmake ../../.. && cmake --build . --target nr-softmodem -j4'.

investigation_commands.hint: Verify that the ASN.1 source files for LTMCellSwitchInformation and LTMCFRAResourceConfig exist
Check if the LTM ASN.1 source files are included in the f1ap_source list in the build configuration
Clean and fully rebuild the project to regenerate libasn1_f1ap.a and fix undefined references

phase3_cmake_diagnosis.diagnosis_summary: The linker errors are caused by missing ASN.1 generated source files (F1AP_LTMCellSwitchInformation.c, F1AP_LTMCFRAResourceConfig.c, and related) in the build system. These files must be included in the ASN1 source list in openair2/F1AP/MESSAGES/ASN1/f1ap-18.6.0.cmake to be compiled into libasn1_f1ap.a and resolve the undefined references.

terminal_commands.explanation: Verify that the ASN.1 source files for LTMCellSwitchInformation and LTMCFRAResourceConfig exist
Check if the LTM ASN.1 source files are included in the f1ap_source list in the build configuration
Clean and fully rebuild the project to regenerate libasn1_f1ap.a and fix undefined references
